ArtifactMetadata: {"ArtifactType":"other","Summary":"Script to search write_to_file tool calls in transcript.jsonl for dining.html."}
CodeContent:
"import json

path = "/Users/pravinsam/.gemini/antigravity-ide/brain/353b6a43-7fa1-4a16-b18d-9ef0cd6ad7d2/.system_generated/logs/transcript.jsonl"
with open(path, "r") as f:
    for line in f:
        data = json.loads(line)
        tcalls = data.get("tool_calls", [])
        if isinstance(tcalls, list):
            for tc in tcalls:
                if tc.get("name") == "write_to_file" and "dining.html" in str(tc.get("args", {})):
                    print(f"Found write_to_file call for dining.html in Step {data.get('step_index')}")
                    # Save args to json
                    with open(f"write_dining_step_{data.get('step_index')}.json", "w") as out_f:
                        json.dump(tc.get("args"), out_f, indent=2)
"
